_licenseInfo.text: This adapter requires a valid license key to operate. The license is bound to your hardware for security purposes.

licenseKey.label: License Key
licenseKey.help: Contact gokturk413 for a valid license key

_licenseWarning.text: ⚠️ Important: This license is hardware-bound. If you see validation errors in the logs, copy your Hardware ID and contact gokturk413.

registeredHardwareIds.label: Registered Hardware IDs
registeredHardwareIds.help: Hardware IDs that are authorized to use this adapter. Your current Hardware ID will be auto-registered on first successful start.

_hardwareIdInfo.text: ℹ️ Your current Hardware ID will be shown in the adapter logs. It will be automatically registered when you enter a valid license key.

_instructions.text:
1. Start the adapter (it will fail on first run)
2. Check logs: iobroker logs webui --lines 50
3. Copy your Hardware ID from logs
4. Send Hardware ID to gokturk413
5. Enter the license key here
6. Restart the adapter
